project_description: Support the planning and execution of symposium, market mapping the expertise of Down syndrome in Hong Kong and the region

organization.name: A Little Bit Extra
organization.description: A Little Bit Extra is striving to become the universal resource partner for individuals with Down syndrome and their families and communities that support them. We provide relevant and accessible up to date resources on health, therapists, educational training programmes and career opportunities for individuals with Down syndrome.

what_we_need: Research Support: Assist in market mapping by researching medical and educational experts in Down syndrome (e.g., clinicians, researchers, educators) using online databases, LinkedIn, and local networks
Stakeholder Coordination: Communicate with speakers, sponsors, and attendees via email or WhatsApp, ensuring timely confirmations and updates
Event Logistics: Support venue coordination, virtual platform setup (e.g., Zoom), and promotional material preparation (e.g., flyers, social media posts).
project_details.background: We will be hosting a symposium on Saturday 27th September between 9.00 - 1.00pm where we will bring together regional and local experts to map expertise in Down syndrome medical care and education. By connecting professionals, families, and advocates, we aim to enhance care and inclusion for individuals with Down syndrome in Hong Kong and beyond.
project_details.what_we_have: Volunteers will have access to our board directors who specialise in both the medical and education field
project_details.why_important: This invaluable research will enable us to strengthen the resources we make available to individuals with Down syndrome and their families here in Hong Kong.
